plist.dict:
Label com.madhavajay.alex.daemon ProgramArguments
/usr/local/bin/alex daemon
__ALEX_LAUNCHD_SOCKETS__ RunAtLoad
KeepAlive
StandardOutPath /tmp/alex.daemon.out.log StandardErrorPath /tmp/alex.daemon.err.log EnvironmentVariables
ALEX_LAUNCHD_SOCKET_ACTIVATION 1 __ALEX_LAUNCHD_HOME__ PATH __ALEX_LAUNCHD_PATH__ RUST_LOG info,alex=debug
